data.content: Plan: Add a HandoffCapsules component to the right sidebar in beat-detail-lightbox.tsx. The component will: (1) extract capsules from beat.metadata.knotsHandoffCapsules, (2) display them in reverse order (latest first), (3) each capsule is individually collapsible showing content/agent/model/datetime, (4) the entire section is collapsible, (5) uses overflow-y-auto for scrolling. Implementation in beat-detail-lightbox.tsx sidebar section, with a new HandoffCapsules component.
